# TKAWEN

> A unified cloud platform: seven APIs (Identity, Connect, Pay, Commerce, Knowledge, Logistics, Developer) that ship together, bill together, and integrate together. One key, one SDK, one dashboard.

## What it is

- Single platform replacing five-to-seven point solutions teams glue together (Auth0 + Twilio + Stripe + Shopify + Onfleet + Teachable + AWS console)
- Four official SDKs: JavaScript/TypeScript, PHP, Python, Go (all MIT)
- Free sandbox, no credit card required
- Pay-as-you-go billing in 13 currencies
- OpenAPI 3.1 spec for the entire surface
- Open-source first-party reference apps (PharmaPro, MyStoq, Algeria Certify, LIQAA Meet)
- 22 public repositories on GitHub

## The seven pillars

1. Identity — OIDC SSO, KYC, trust signals
2. Connect — video, voice, SMS, WhatsApp, email, TTS
3. Pay — cards, wallets, transfers, recurring billing in 13 currencies
4. Commerce — multi-tenant storefronts, catalog, checkout
5. Knowledge — courses, AI tutors, verifiable certificates
6. Logistics — fleet GPS + multi-carrier shipping
7. Developer Cloud — gateway, SDKs, OpenAPI, sandbox, status

## Production proof

- 200+ live merchants on MyStoq
- 4,116+ verified users on Algeria Certify
- LIQAA Meet open-sourced under AGPL-3.0
- Sub-millisecond page render times (Rust + Axum + Maud)
